zh.lifeSummary: 當William Corbet Lord of Worthen於1089年出生在英國史洛普爾維斯特波利時，他的父親Robert Corbet35歲，母親Adèle d'Alcester33歲。他於1109年與Isabel de Valletort在英國史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1136年在英國史洛普爾卡德斯頓享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Corbet Lord of Worthen于1089年出生在英国史洛普爾維斯特波利时，他的父亲Robert Corbet35岁，母亲Adèle d'Alcester33岁。他于1109年与Isabel de Valletort在英国史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1136年在英国史洛普爾卡德斯頓享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When William Corbet Lord of Worthen was born in 1089, in Westbury, Shropshire, England, his father, Robert Corbet, was 35 and his mother, Adèle d'Alcester, was 33. He married Isabel de Valletort in 1109, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1136, in Cardeston, Shropshire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Corbet Lord of Worthen est né en 1089, à Westbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Corbet, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Adèle d'Alcester, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Valletort en 1109, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1136, à Cardeston, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Corbet Lord of Worthen 1089 in Westbury, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Corbet 35 und seine Mutter Adèle d'Alcester 33. Er hat 1109 in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England Isabel de Valletort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1136 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Cardeston, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Corbet Lord of Worthen è nato il nel 1089 nel Westbury, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Corbet, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Adèle d'Alcester, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Valletort nel 1109, nel Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1136, nel Cardeston, Shropshire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Corbet Lord of Worthenが1089年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエストブリーで生まれた時，父Robert Corbetは35歳，母Adèle d'Alcesterは33歳であった。1109年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアワットレスボロウでIsabel de Valletortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1136年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアカーデストンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Corbet Lord of Worthen(이)가 1089년 영국 슈럽실르 웨스트버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Corbet(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Adèle d'Alcester(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1109년 영국 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루에서 Isabel de Valletort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1136년 영국 슈럽실르 카데스턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Corbet Lord of Worthen nasceu em 1089, em Westbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Corbet, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Adèle d'Alcester, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Valletort em 1109, em Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1136, em Cardeston, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Corbet Lord of Worthen родился в 1089 г. в местности вестбури, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Corbet было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Adèle d'Alcester, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Valletort в 1109 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1136 г. в местности кардестон, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Corbet Lord of Worthen nació en 1089, en Westbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Corbet, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Adèle d'Alcester, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Isabel de Valletort en 1109, en Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1136, en Cardeston, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
